overall.description: A continuous drive through a futuristic cyberpunk urban highway, beginning under a concrete overpass and proceeding through an industrial zone with elevated highways, power lines, and large digital billboards. The overcast lighting and wet asphalt create a moody, atmospheric scene typical of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark highway overpass, with the camera driving forward alongside a graffiti-covered concrete wall. The space is enclosed and dimly lit, with vehicles occasionally passing by in the right lanes. The atmosphere is industrial and confined.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into an open industrial highway environment. Elevated highway ramps curve overhead on the right, while power lines stretch across the left side. The lighting shifts from dark to natural overcast daylight as vehicles continue to pass by.

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through an industrial area with a grassy median dividing the lanes. A massive digital billboard advertising 'IT'S BIG' becomes visible in the distance and gradually approaches. Various vehicles including a large military truck pass by on the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera drives past the massive 'IT'S BIG' billboard, which now dominates the right side of the frame. The highway continues with industrial warehouses appearing on the left, while the concrete retaining wall returns to the immediate left foreground. The environment remains overcast and industrial.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a confined, dimly lit underpass into an expansive industrial highway landscape under an overcast sky. It begins in the shadows beneath a dark highway overpass, moving forward alongside a graffiti-covered concrete wall within a cramped, industrial atmosphere. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the space opens up into a wide highway environment where the lighting shifts to natural daylight and elevated ramps curve overhead. The scene then expands further across a grassy median as a massive digital billboard advertising IT'S BIG looms in the distance, with military trucks and other vehicles passing by on the right. Finally, the camera drives past the dominating billboard and continues along a stretch of industrial warehouses and concrete retaining walls under the persistent gray sky.
